task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Fall Curriculum OER' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmarks toolbar, sidebar, or library window showing a folder explicitly named 'Fall Curriculum OER'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Fall Curriculum OER' bookmark folder contains the landing pages for the three required textbooks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the 'Fall Curriculum OER' folder in Firefox showing saved bookmarks for 'Psychology 2e', 'Calculus Volume 1', and 'Microbiology'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PDF version of 'Psychology 2e' has been downloaded to the ~/Downloads/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing the ~/Downloads/ folder containing the Psychology 2e PDF file, or the Firefox download manager showing the completed download of the PDF.

task_completion.description: Verify that a file named 'oer_report.json' has been created in the ~/Documents/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal showing 'oer_report.json' located inside the ~/Documents/ directory, or a text editor saving to this path.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'oer_report.json' contains the required base JSON structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the open 'oer_report.json' file in a text editor and verify it contains the key-value pair '"curriculum_pilot": "Fall 2024"' and a '"resources": [...]' array.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'resources' array in 'oer_report.json' contains the correct digital ISBN-13, license, and authors for all three textbooks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of 'oer_report.json' and check that the entries contain the correct ISBNs (e.g., 978-1-975076-45-0 for Psychology 2e, 978-1-947172-13-5 for Calculus Vol 1, 978-1-947172-23-4 for Microbiology) and the correct authors (Spielman, Strang/Herman, Parker/Schneegurt).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used the Firefox browser to navigate OpenStax and create bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Firefox browser open and navigating openstax.org, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify that the PDF was genuinely downloaded from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox download progress indicator or a legitimate download action on the OpenStax website, ensuring the agent didn't just create an empty dummy file named with a .pdf extension.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent gathered the information and constructed the JSON file interactively.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) being used to write the JSON file, or terminal commands showing the agent actively compiling the scraped data, rather than pasting a pre-computed hallucinated block of text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Psychology 2e: Digital ISBN is 978-1-975076-45-0 (or 978-1975076450), primary author is Rose M. Spielman. Calculus Volume 1: Digital ISBN is 978-1-947172-13-5, senior contributing authors are Gilbert Strang and Edwin 'Jed' Herman. Microbiology: Digital ISBN is 978-1-947172-23-4, primary authors include Nina Parker and Mark Schneegurt. All are OpenStax resources.
